name: @graduenz/mcp-sqlite-server
description: MCP server for SQLite databases using better-sqlite3

scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:test && npm test
scripts.test:coverage: c8 --reporter=lcov --reporter=text node --import tsx --test src/config.test.ts src/database.test.ts src/resources/schema.test.ts src/integration.test.ts src/index.test.ts
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/config.test.ts src/database.test.ts src/resources/schema.test.ts src/integration.test.ts src/index.test.ts
